top.title: Norway's crown princess breaks silence, claiming she was 'manipulated and deceived' by Epstein
top.summary: Crown Princess Mette Marit tells Norwegian TV she wishes she had never met the late sex offender.

top.title: Israel strikes Syria after Druze clashes
top.summary: Syria condemned the strikes on weapons sites and government infrastructure as an "outrageous" assault on Syria's sovereignty.

top.title: BTS return from military service - but does their album live up to the hype?
top.summary: The band's 10th album sees them return to the rebellious, rap-heavy sound of their early days.

top.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
top.summary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

top.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
top.summary: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

top.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
top.summary: Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.

title.#text: Windows 11 is finally getting a movable taskbar
Microsoft is ending the Windows Update nightmare — and letting you pause them indefinitely
This is Microsoft’s plan to fix Windows 11
